meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve overwhelmed by AI tools (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome overwhelmed by AI tools. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: overwhelmed by AI tools

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup for Freelancers: Master AI Workflow
content.seo_description: Stop drowning in AI tools. Master Claude Code skills setup to streamline your dev workflow, ship faster, and scale your freelance business with Antigravity.
content.answer_block: Stop juggling fragmented AI tools. By centralizing your workflow through Claude Code and Antigravity, you transform your terminal into a high-octane engineering command center. This integration automates boilerplate, enforces architectural standards, and allows you to execute complex refactors with single-sentence prompts, effectively doubling your output while maintaining elite code quality.
content.intro:
The modern freelance landscape is a graveyard of abandoned AI tools. You’ve got a browser tab for drafting, a terminal for coding, and a separate window for context management—all while your productivity bleeds out into a sea of context-switching. You aren't just building apps; you are drowning in a chaotic, fragmented tech stack that threatens your billable hours and your sanity.

But what if your terminal became your senior engineer? By leveraging Claude Code alongside Antigravity, we collapse that complexity. We are moving from 'prompt-engineering' to 'system-engineering,' turning your IDE into a deterministic engine that executes high-level architecture tasks with surgical precision. It is time to stop playing with tools and start shipping products.

steps.title: Initialize the Command Environment
steps.description: Establish the base configuration by syncing your project path with the Claude CLI to ensure the model has full file-system awareness.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project directory structure and identify the primary framework and state management patterns. Output a summary for context-loading.

steps.title: Architectural Blueprinting
steps.description: Use Antigravity to define your project constraints so Claude Code doesn't hallucinate outside your tech stack requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a 'project-manifest.md' detailing the folder structure, naming conventions, and preferred testing libraries. Enforce strict TypeScript strict mode.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Read project-manifest.md and enforce these rules for all future edits.'

steps.title: Automated Boilerplate Injection
steps.description: Stop writing repetitive auth and API handlers. Let the engine build the foundation based on your architectural specs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust authentication middleware using Supabase and Next.js App Router, ensuring type-safety and error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Implement auth middleware based on the manifest guidelines.'

steps.title: Recursive Refactor & Optimization
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform deep-codebase refactors that would take hours manually, ensuring cross-file consistency.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current codebase for circular dependencies and suggest a modular refactor to improve tree-shaking performance.

steps.title: CI/CD Pipeline Integration
steps.description: Finalize your setup by mapping your AI-driven code edits to a deployment script that triggers on every successful commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs linting, unit tests, and a build check before deploying to Vercel.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Create .github/workflows/deploy.yml with standard CI/CD steps.'

pro_tips: Always use a .claudeignore file to prevent the agent from indexing node_modules or massive build artifacts.
Use 'claude chat' for architectural brainstorming before running 'claude write' to execute changes.
When facing a complex bug, use 'claude run' to have it write a reproduction test case before attempting a fix.
Keep your project-manifest.md updated; it serves as the 'source of truth' for the AI's context window.
Alias your most complex Claude Code commands in your shell profile to save keystrokes during rapid iteration.
content.next_steps: Once your environment is configured, start by porting a single legacy module into your new setup. Measure the time taken versus your manual baseline, then iterate on your project-manifest.md to further refine the AI's output consistency.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting time on tool friction and start delivering high-value code that keeps clients coming back. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
